_doc: Every entry in migrations/meta/_journal.json must appear here. See README.md for the belt-and-suspenders rationale and how to choose a status.

0000_brainy_mother_askani.reason: Pre-bootstrap baseline schema. Pre-marked as applied by bootstrapDrizzleMigrationState() on legacy DBs.

0001_optional_password_hash.reason: Pre-bootstrap. Pre-marked as applied by bootstrapDrizzleMigrationState() on legacy DBs.

0002_db_integrity_hardening.reason: Pre-bootstrap. Pre-marked as applied by bootstrapDrizzleMigrationState() on legacy DBs.

0003_add_business_insurance.reason: Pre-bootstrap. Pre-marked as applied by bootstrapDrizzleMigrationState() on legacy DBs.

0004_consolidated_schema.reason: Consolidated baseline schema; all statements use IF NOT EXISTS / IF EXISTS guards. Runs via migrate() on every DB, including legacy.

0005_google_drive_tokens.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS only.

0006_add_missing_indexes.reason: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS only.

0007_scenario_shares.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS / ADD COLUMN guarded by DO blocks.

0008_scenario_computed_results.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS only.

0009_intelligence_v2.reason: Tables and columns added with IF NOT EXISTS / DO block guards.

0010_scenario_service_templates.reason: ADD COLUMN service_templates IF NOT EXISTS on scenarios.

0011_capital_raise_rename.reason: Column rename guarded by information_schema check in DO block.

0012_pgvector_store.reason: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS + CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS.

0013_industry_vertical_exit_multiple.reason: ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS only.

0014_saved_tabs.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS only.

0016_tax_bulletin_cache.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS only.

0017_specialist_identity_overrides.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS / ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS.

0018_specialist_recommendation_events.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS only.

0019_specialist_config_missing_columns.reason: ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS only.

0021_backfill_company_change_log_entity_.reason: Pure data backfill; updates rows where entity_id IS NULL. Re-running is a no-op once the column is populated.

0022_specialist_llm_overrides.reason: ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS only. Replaced the earlier specialist_multi_model_001 runtime guard.

0023_rebecca_config_jsonb.reason: ALTER COLUMN type change guarded by information_schema check in DO block.

0024_oidc_sessions.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS only.

0025_property_price_history.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS only.

0027_scenario_share_consolidation.reason: Idempotent consolidation of scenario_shares schema with DO block guards.

0028_reference_brands.reason: Original belt-and-suspenders incident: this migration was pre-marked as applied on the legacy Neon DB, so migrate() never executed it. The runtime guard re-creates the table with CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS on every boot.

0029_batch10_slide_decks_and_constraints.reason: Phase C batch 10 consolidation: every statement uses IF NOT EXISTS / IF EXISTS / DO block guards. Originally backed by property_slide_decks_001/002, property_slide_deck_variants_001, reference_brands_run_fk_001, and property_photos_hero_unique_001 runtime guards (now consolidated).

0030_evidence_based_indexes.reason: Task #972 evidence-based composite/partial indexes. Every statement is CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS — re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0031_drop_unused_indexes.reason: Task #973 audit-driven cleanup of unused indexes. All 45 statements are DROP INDEX IF EXISTS — re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0032_property_deck_payloads.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS property_deck_payloads — sidecar editor table for the L+B canonical 6-slide investor deck. Re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0033_property_slide_deck_variants_pdf_fo.reason: DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS + ADD CONSTRAINT — widens the property_slide_deck_variants.format CHECK to include 'pdf'. Re-running drops and re-adds the same constraint, which is a no-op net change.

0034_fk_indexes.reason: Task #971 — 13 CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS statements adding btree indexes on FK columns missing from prior migrations. Re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0035_lb_slides_config.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lb_slides_config — single-row config table for the LB Slide Deck portfolio investor presentation. Re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0036_knowledge_registry.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_registry + CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS knowledge_registry_assets — Knowledge Registry feature (U1). Both statements are guarded with IF NOT EXISTS; re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0037_hnsw_index_no_do_block.reason: NAI-26 fix: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector + CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS vector_chunks_embedding_hnsw USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops). Replaces the DO-block approach in 0012 which Railway's migration runner mangled. All statements use IF NOT EXISTS; re-running is a no-op.

0038_add_capital_raise_3.reason: ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS capital_raise_3_amount real, capital_raise_3_date text on global_assumptions. Both statements use IF NOT EXISTS; re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0039_lb_slides_global_copy.reason: ALTER TABLE lb_slides_config ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS slide4_section_subtitle + slide6_disclaimer. Both statements use IF NOT EXISTS; re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0040_iris_runs.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS iris_runs — Iris backstage agent run log table (U4). Statement uses IF NOT EXISTS; re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0041_slide_factory_runs.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS slide_factory_runs + CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS — slide factory V2 run-state table. All statements use IF NOT EXISTS; re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0042_rebecca_chat_prefs.reason: ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rebecca_response_mode + rebecca_show_tool_timing on users. Guarded by rebecca-chat-prefs-001.ts to ensure columns are present on pre-existing DBs regardless of Drizzle journal state.

0043_rebecca_history_chips.reason: ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rebecca_history_open + rebecca_suggested_chips on users. Guarded by rebecca-history-chips-001.ts to ensure columns exist on pre-existing DBs regardless of Drizzle journal state.

0044_admin_resources_budget_and_kinds.reason: ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS daily_request_budget on admin_resources for Pietro scheduler rate limiting. Guarded by admin-resources-006.ts to ensure column exists on pre-existing DBs regardless of Drizzle journal state.

0045_create_reit_benchmarks_and_competit.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reit_benchmarks + competitor_rates — Pietro data cache tables for REIT fundamentals and competitor hotel rates. Guarded by pietro-tables-001.ts to ensure tables exist on pre-existing DBs regardless of Drizzle journal state.

0046_reference_data_tables.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS geography_dimension, jurisdictional_taxes, market_cap_rates, regulatory_fees — reference data tables for geo/tax/fees/cap-rate Analyst research. All CREATE TABLE statements use IF NOT EXISTS; indexes use CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS; FK constraints and competitor_rates unique-constraint change use DO block guards. Re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0047_enzo_slot_content_hashes.reason: ALTER TABLE slide_factory_runs ADD COLUMN slot_content_hashes jsonb — Enzo verdict cache column. ADD COLUMN on a nullable jsonb column is additive; a second run would fail with 'column already exists' but migrate() never re-runs a journaled entry.

0048_costantino_findings.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS costantino_findings + indexes + two ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING admin_resources seeds (llm_slot 'costantino-orchestration', parameter 'costantino-health-cycle-interval-ms'). The llm_slot insert is conditional on pietro-orchestration existing, so a re-run on a fresh DB before admin-resources-005 is also a no-op. Cadence numeric literals in the SQL are documented in the file header and exempt from check:magic-numbers (SQL files are not scanned).

0050_factory_v2_runs_columns.reason: Factory v2 schema extension for slide_factory_runs (plan U3) — adds slide4_property_id (FK properties, SET NULL), wish_list_log (jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb), pptx_r2_key (text), and widens the status CHECK to include 'substituting', 'converting_pdf', and 'rebuilding' (latent TS-vs-DB drift heal). Guarded by slide-factory-runs-v2-columns.ts because the slide_factory_runs table was the canonical example of the journal-state drift incident documented in drizzle-migration-state-drift-missing-tables-2026-05-07.

0051_minion_self_test_runs.reason: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS minion_self_test_runs + matching index — append-only short history of POST /api/admin/minions/:id/self-test invocations (Task #1396). All statements use IF NOT EXISTS; re-running via migrate() is a no-op. Trim-to-N is enforced by the storage layer (MINION_SELF_TEST_HISTORY_KEEP) on every insert, not by the migration.

0052_minion_self_test_cadence.reason: Single INSERT INTO admin_resources ... ON CONFLICT (kind, slug) DO NOTHING — seeds the minion-self-test cycle-interval parameter row. Re-running is a safe no-op; the ON CONFLICT guard ensures no duplicate is created (Task #1397).

0053_property_assumptions_improved_colum.reason: Task #1404 Milestone A — adds six nullable As-Improved integer/text columns to properties (fb_venues_improved, fb_seats_improved, event_space_sqft_improved, total_building_sqft_improved, planned_reopening_year, description_improved). Every statement uses ALTER TABLE … ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS; re-running on an already-migrated DB is a no-op.

0054_property_description_purchased.reason: Task #1404 Milestone A — adds nullable description_purchased text column to properties via ALTER TABLE … ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS, then backfills from legacy description with WHERE … IS NULL guard. Both statements are idempotent; the UPDATE is a no-op when description_purchased is already populated.

0055_vendor_passthrough_and_markup_facto.reason: Task #1410 — CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vendor_passthrough_costs + mgmt_co_markup_factors plus matching unique/regular indexes (all IF NOT EXISTS). Two national research cache tables for ICP bracket model R11–R14. Populated by MinionVendorPassthroughCosts (Gaetano) and MinionMgmtCoMarkupFactors (Renato). Re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0056_icp_bracket_catalog.reason: Task #1409 — creates icp_brackets table (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS) and adds bracket_mix JSONB column to global_assumptions (ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS in DO block). Guarded by icp-brackets-001.ts which also seeds 4 starter brackets (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING) and registers the admin_resources entry (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING).

0057_icp_bracket_mix.reason: Task #1412 — single ALTER TABLE "global_assumptions" ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS "bracket_mix" jsonb. Adds the management company's weighted ICP bracket mix column; NULL = not yet assigned. Companion to 0056_icp_bracket_catalog (which also adds bracket_mix via a guarded DO block); 0057 is the canonical column source. Re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0058_self_test_logs.reason: Task #1647 / Task #1403 — the original SQL had a type mismatch: finding_id was typed as integer referencing costantino_findings('id'), but the actual PK is uuid named finding_id. The corrected SQL uses uuid. The runtime guard (self-test-logs-001.ts) applies the correct DDL idempotently on every boot, ensuring self_test_interval_days and self_test_logs exist on all environments regardless of whether the journal was applied with the old or new SQL hash.

0059_research_runs_constant_latest_idx.reason: Task #1437 — single CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS statement adding research_runs_constant_latest_idx, a partial btree on (metadata->'constant'->>'key', metadata->'constant'->>'country', metadata->'constant'->>'subdivision', completed_at DESC) WHERE entity_type = 'model-constant' AND status = 'completed'. Backs ResearchRunsStorage.getLatestSuccessfulRunsForAllConstants() so the DISTINCT ON batch query stays O(log n) as research_runs grows. Re-running via migrate() is a no-op.

0063_icp_brackets_default_overlay.reason: Plan 2026-05-13-001 U5 — adds two NULL-able real columns to icp_brackets (default_exit_cap_rate, default_refi_max_ltv_to_original) for the Layer-2 bracket overlay in the layered defaults resolver. Both statements are ALTER TABLE ... ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS; re-running via migrate() is a no-op. Guarded by icp-brackets-003.ts which re-applies the same ALTERs at boot to handle dev DBs whose _journal.json has drifted past 0063. Renumbered from 0060 to 0063 to avoid slot collision with PR #138 migrations 0060/0061/0062.

0064_properties_refi_ltv_cap.reason: Plan 2026-05-13-003 Phase 5 — adds nullable real column refi_max_ltv_to_original to properties. Caps refi loan at (refi_max_ltv_to_original × purchase_price) to prevent equity stripping on Full Equity properties. ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is idempotent. Guarded by properties-refi-ltv-cap-001.ts which re-applies the same ALTER at boot for dev DBs whose _journal.json has drifted past 0064.

0065_extend_business_brands_multi_flag.reason: Plan 2026-05-13-006 U1 — extends business_brands with slug, business_model, segment, sort_order, is_active, updated_at columns; changes is_default DEFAULT to false; creates partial unique index on slug; seeds h-plus-hotel slug for default brand; backfills NULL brand_id on properties; flips properties.brand_id FK from ON DELETE SET NULL to ON DELETE RESTRICT; sets brand_id NOT NULL. Guarded by business-brands-multi-flag-001.ts which re-applies all DDL idempotently at boot (ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS, DO $$ block for FK swap).

0066_create_mgmt_co_and_brand_fees.reason: Plan 2026-05-13-006 U2 — drops partial unique index on business_brands.slug, makes slug NOT NULL + adds full UNIQUE constraint (FK target for brand_fees), creates management_company_fees (global Tier-A fee schedule) and brand_fees (per-flag fee schedule) tables, seeds base_mgmt 8.5% + incentive 12% rows, seeds H+ Hotel brand stack (5 rows) + H+ STR Ultra-Luxury OTA fees (5 rows), assigns Medellin Duplex to STR flag. Guarded by mgmt-co-fees-tables-001.ts which re-applies all DDL idempotently (IF NOT EXISTS / DO $$ blocks) and seeds via ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING.

0067_icp_brackets_match_rules.reason: Plan 2026-05-13-001 U7 — adds six match-rule columns to icp_brackets (match_countries, match_business_models, match_quality_tiers, match_keywords jsonb; match_priority integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0; match_rationale text). All ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS; re-running via migrate() is a no-op. Guarded by icp-brackets-005.ts which re-applies the same ALTERs at boot for dev DBs whose _journal.json has drifted past 0067.

0068_property_fee_markup.reason: Task #1677 — adds nullable real column service_markup to property_fee_categories. When NULL, the financial engine falls back to the company service template markup. When set, it overrides the template markup for that property/category pair. Guarded by property-fee-markup-001.ts which re-applies the same ALTER at boot via ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS to handle dev DBs whose journal has drifted. Renumbered from 0064 → 0068 to avoid slot collision with main's 0064 (properties_refi_ltv_cap) during the 2026-05-15 merge of main into chore/replit-steady-state-rename.

0069_slide_factory_runs_pdf_r2_key.reason: Factory v2 — adds pptx_r2_key and pdf_r2_key text columns to slide_factory_runs. Guarded by slide-factory-runs-pdf-r2-key-001.ts which re-applies ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS at boot to handle any DB whose journal has drifted past 0069.

0070_users_assigned_scenario_id.reason: T1-3 — adds nullable integer column assigned_scenario_id to users with FK REFERENCES scenarios(id) ON DELETE SET NULL. Column + FK applied idempotently at boot by users-assigned-scenario-001.ts. Allows admin to pre-assign a default scenario to a user so ensureDefaultScenario skips auto-creation on login.

0071_properties_brand_id_fk_restrict.reason: T1-5 — fixes brand_id FK constraint to explicitly declare ON DELETE RESTRICT, matching the Drizzle schema declaration. Migration 0065 added the FK without ON DELETE clause (PostgreSQL defaults to NO ACTION, functionally identical for non-deferred constraints). No data changes; only drops and recreates the same FK constraint with the explicit action.

0072_create_portfolios.reason: T2-2 — creates portfolios table (id, user_id, name, description, created_at, updated_at) with FK to users ON DELETE CASCADE, then adds nullable portfolio_id FK column to properties ON DELETE SET NULL. Both DDL operations are idempotent (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS, DO $$ constraint guard).

0073_slide_factory_verification.reason: T2-4 — adds nullable verification_status (text) and verification_log (jsonb) columns to slide_factory_runs for Bianca visual quality verification results. Both columns are idempotent (ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS).

0074_scenario_perspective_role.reason: T2-1 — adds perspective_role text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'operator' column to scenarios. Existing rows receive 'operator' via the DEFAULT clause. Idempotent (ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS).

0075_adr_growth_rate_default.reason: §2 T1-4 DEFAULT_ADR_GROWTH_RATE retirement — adds SQL DEFAULT 0.03 to properties.adr_growth_rate. SET DEFAULT is idempotent: re-running sets the same value. Existing rows are unaffected; only future inserts that omit the field benefit from the default.

0076_travel_it_defaults.reason: §2 T1-4 retirement of DEFAULT_TRAVEL_COST_PER_CLIENT (5000→12000) and DEFAULT_IT_LICENSE_PER_CLIENT (3600→3000) — sets correct AHLA/HFTP 2024 SQL DEFAULTs on global_assumptions. SET DEFAULT is idempotent; existing rows unaffected, future inserts without explicit values use the corrected defaults.
